SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: udge Pro Tem Paul A. Renne, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:50am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Paul David Weller and Carole Elizabeth Weller appear as Pro Per Respondents; Christina Esteras appears as representative for Lucy Esteras, in Pro Per, for Appellant. (Ms. Esteras is the daughter of deceased appellant, Lucy Esteras and has been allowed by the Court to appear in her stead.)
Respondents, Mr. and Ms. Weller, previously sworn, present their case in the narrarive. Appellant Ms. Esteras, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative.
EXHAA Letter to Christina Esteras, and a check list re condition of property
EXHAB photo album of information and color photos re property in question
EXHR1 NOV-11-05 letter to Christina Esteras
10:15am
The matter is submitted. The evidence is admitted and retained.
